description.zh-CN: 首次切入编辑模式。退后，我要开始发力了。
description.en-US: Entered Edit mode for the first time. Stand back, serious work starts now.

trigger.condition: Fire once when user enters edit mode for the first time.

description.zh-CN: 在编辑模式下第一次新增展柜。大就是好，多就是美！
description.en-US: Added your first showcase in Edit mode. Bigger is better.

trigger.condition: Fire once when user adds any new editable showcase component in edit mode.

description.zh-CN: 第一次创建“收藏的指南（唱片）”展柜。
description.en-US: Created the Collected Guide (vinyl) showcase for the first time.

trigger.condition: Fire once when collectedGuideShowcase is added for the first time.

description.zh-CN: 点击“新建桌面画布”并清空当前设计。
description.en-US: Clicked New Desktop Canvas and reset the current design.

trigger.condition: Fire once when user clicks New Desktop Canvas for the first time.
